name: Aegidron
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (60~80)% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to Stun. (Does not stack)

name: Amione
shortEffect: While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Anubis
shortEffect: When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type to Ground and increases Attack by (30~50)%. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.

name: Arsox
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Cold Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

name: Astegon
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores by (1100~3300)%, and you can obtain (150~300)% more Ore while mounted.

name: Astralym
shortEffect: This Pal's abilities are still being investigated.

name: Azurmane
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Grants Air Dash, to move at even higher speeds.

name: Azurobe
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Azurobe Cryst
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Bakemi
shortEffect: While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack by (40~80)%. (Does not stack)

name: Bastigor
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a hammer forged from Ice.

name: Beakon
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon )

name: Beakon Cryst
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Ice Pal in your party. (Excluding Beakon Cryst )

name: Beegarde
shortEffect: While in party, increases Elizabee's Attack. Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.

name: Bellanoir
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray. When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

name: Bellanoir Libero
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom. When this Pal uses Nightmare Bloom, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

name: Blazamut
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (5~10)% whenever you defeat an enemy. This effect lasts 20 seconds and stacks up to five times.

name: Blazamut Ryu
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dragon damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

name: Blazehowl
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, Grass Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Blazehowl Noct
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, Neutral Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Blue Slime
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

name: Braloha
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in your base, increases the egg production speed of Pals assigned to Breeding Farm by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

name: Bristla
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Grass Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Broncherry
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a (35~45)% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

name: Broncherry Aqua
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a (45~55)% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

name: Bulldosu
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Electric damage and are immune to Electrify. (Does not stack)

name: Bushi
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

name: Bushi Noct
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (30~65)% but only when not in combat. (Does not stack)

name: Caprity
shortEffect: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores (100~200) Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

name: Caprity Noct
shortEffect: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores (100~200) Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

name: Carnibora
shortEffect: While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches ( Grass / Power: (40~80) ). (Does not stack)

name: Cattiva
shortEffect: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by (100~200). (Does not stack)

name: Cave Bat
shortEffect: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

name: Cawgnito
shortEffect: When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

name: Celaray
shortEffect: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

name: Celaray Lux
shortEffect: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

name: Celesdir
shortEffect: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increases by (2~6)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. When in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by (0.15~0.75)% per second. (Does not stack)

name: Celesdir Noct
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for (40~80)% Attack increase. (Does not stack)

name: Chikipi
shortEffect: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

name: Chillet
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dragon and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Chillet Ignis
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Cinnamoth
shortEffect: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Poison Fog. While at a base, increases the Farming Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Clovee
shortEffect: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Cremis
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

name: Croajiro
shortEffect: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attack is increased by (50~86)%.

name: Croajiro Noct
shortEffect: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

name: Cryolinx
shortEffect: While in party, Dragon Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Cryolinx Terra
shortEffect: While in party, when attacking enemy weak point, increases the power of the next weak point attack by (30~60)%. (Does not stack)

name: Daedream
shortEffect: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

name: Dandilord
shortEffect: When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison (2~6). While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not stack)

name: Dazemu
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (50~100)% while mounted on sand.

name: Dazzi
shortEffect: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Electric bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

name: Dazzi Noct
shortEffect: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

name: Demon Eye
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Depresso
shortEffect: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by (100~900)%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

name: Digtoise
shortEffect: When activated, enters the Shell Spin state. Follows the player while spinning, increasing ore mining efficiency by (800~2000)%.

name: Dinossom
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, increase Defense of Dragon Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Dinossom Lux
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Defense of Electric Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Direhowl
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.

name: Dogen
shortEffect: When activated, teleports to the nearest base. Cannot be used inside dungeons or similar areas.

name: Dualith
shortEffect: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith fires a powerful Grass laser from its right hand.

name: Dualith Noct
shortEffect: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith Noct fires a powerful Dark laser from its right hand.

name: Dumud
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Ground Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch.

name: Dumud Gild
shortEffect: While in party, increases amount of Gold Coin dropped by enemies by +(100~200)%. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin. (Does not stack)

name: Dupin
shortEffect: While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player ( Fire / Power: (100~200) / Burn buildup: 777 ). Additionally, while the player's Health is below 50%, the player's Attack is increased by (30~50)%. (Does not stack)

name: Dynamoff
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

name: Eidrolon
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% for each other Dragon or Dark Pal in your party.

name: Eidrolon Ignis
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by (2~6)% or each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis )

name: Eikthyrdeer
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by (220~500)%.

name: Eikthyrdeer Terra
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While at a base, increases the Lumbering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 (Does not stack)

name: Elgrove
shortEffect: When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

name: Elgrove Cryst
shortEffect: While in party, grants the player the ability to Freeze enemies afflicted with Soak in one strike.

name: Elizabee
shortEffect: This Pal's Attack increases by (12~24)% for each Beegarde in party.

name: Elphidran
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, Dark Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Elphidran Aqua
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Fire damage and are immune to Burn. (Does not stack)

name: Enchanted Sword
shortEffect: While in party, Dark Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Eye of Cthulhu
shortEffect: When activated, Eye of Cthulhu charges and attacks targeted enemy.

name: Faleris
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Ice Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Faleris Aqua
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Felbat
shortEffect: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat a life steal effect that restores (5~9)% of damage dealt as Health.

name: Fenglope
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

name: Fenglope Lux
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. While in party, Water Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Finsider
shortEffect: When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

name: Finsider Ignis
shortEffect: While in party, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, reducing the weight of weapons in your inventory by (60~100)%. Also improves player's and Pals' Fire damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

name: Flambelle
shortEffect: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by (0.1~0.5)% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Flaracle
shortEffect: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy explodes, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

name: Flopie
shortEffect: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

name: Foxcicle
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Ice Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Foxparks
shortEffect: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

name: Foxparks Cryst
shortEffect: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

name: Frostallion
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice, inflict Freeze (2~6), increases Attack by (10~40)%.

name: Frostallion Noct
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Dark, inflict Blind (2~6), increases Attack by (10~40)%.

name: Frostplume
shortEffect: While in party, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens focus, increasing the player's reload speeds by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

name: Fuack
shortEffect: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

name: Fuack Ignis
shortEffect: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

name: Fuddler
shortEffect: While in party, improves player mining efficiency by (30~60)% and reduces Stone weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

name: Galeclaw
shortEffect: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

name: Ghangler
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Dark or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler )

name: Ghangler Ignis
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Fire or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler Ignis )

name: Gildane
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ground and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Gildra
shortEffect: While fighting together, when Gildra is incapacitated, it revives with its Hunger reduced to 0.

name: Gloopie
shortEffect: While in party, the capture gauge decreases (12~35)% more slowly while the bars are not overlapping during the fishing minigame. (Does not stack)

name: Gloopie Primo
shortEffect: While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Gobfin
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Aqua Gun. When this Pal uses Aqua Gun, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by (10~20)%.

name: Gobfin Ignis
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Spirit Fire. When this Pal uses Spirit Fire, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by (10~20)%.

name: Gorirat
shortEffect: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's Attack by (75~300)% for a limited time.

name: Gorirat Terra
shortEffect: While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by (50~100)%. (Does not stack)

name: Green Slime
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

name: Grintale
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, picking up a Pal Egg has a (50~75)% chance of receiving one extra. (Does not stack)

name: Grizzbolt
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.

name: Gumoss
shortEffect: While in party, improves logging efficiency by (30~50)% and reduces weight of all types of wood by (40~60)%. (Does not stack)

name: Hangyu
shortEffect: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascension while gliding.

name: Hangyu Cryst
shortEffect: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables slow ascension while gliding.

name: Hartalis
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks. Can triple jump while mounted.

name: Helzephyr
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Helzephyr Lux
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Herbil
shortEffect: While in party, Herbil uses its healing powers to restore (30~60)% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

name: Hoocrates
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Hoodle
shortEffect: While in party, increases the player's damage dealt to enemies that are not in combat by (50~100)%. (Does not stack)

name: Icelyn
shortEffect: When activated, Icelyn changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

name: Illuminant Bat
shortEffect: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

name: Illuminant Slime
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

name: Incineram
shortEffect: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Hellfire Claw. When this Pal uses Hellfire Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

name: Incineram Noct
shortEffect: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Nightmare Claw. When this Pal uses Nightmare Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier.

name: Jelliette
shortEffect: While in party, increases items obtained from fishing by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jelliette's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

name: Jellroy
shortEffect: While in party, increases items obtained from salvaging by (55~95)%. While Jelliette and Jellroy are in your base, Jellroy's watering speed increases by (50~120)%. (Does not stack)

name: Jetragon
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

name: Jolthog
shortEffect: When activated, equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Electric explosion upon impact.

name: Jolthog Cryst
shortEffect: When activated, equips Jolthog Cryst to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an Ice explosion upon impact.

name: Jormuntide
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Soak by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

name: Jormuntide Ignis
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, nullifies lava damage and increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Burn by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

name: Katress
shortEffect: While in party, Neutral Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. Also has a (10~50)% chance to prevent Pal Sphere consumption when thrown. (Does not stack)

name: Katress Ignis
shortEffect: While at a base, increases the Kindling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Kelpsea
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Water Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Aquatic Pal Fluids when assigned to Ranch.

name: Kelpsea Ignis
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Kikit
shortEffect: While in party, increases Defense of Ground Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Killamari
shortEffect: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

name: Killamari Primo
shortEffect: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables gentle floating while gliding for an extended time.

name: Kingpaca
shortEffect: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

name: Kingpaca Cryst
shortEffect: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Ice damage and are immune to Freeze. (Does not stack)

shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Dark damage and are immune to Blind. (Does not stack)

shortEffect: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem's Attack by (50~200)% and Defense by (50~200)% for a limited time.

name: Knocklem Ignis
shortEffect: When activated, a steel resolve increases Knocklem Ignis's Attack by (60~210)% and Defense by (60~210)% for a limited time.

name: Lamball
shortEffect: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

name: Lapiron
shortEffect: While in party, increases the player's Defense by (50~65)% while sprinting. (Does not stack)

name: Lapure
shortEffect: While in party, reduces the Partner Skill cooldowns for other party Pals by (10~50)%. (Does not stack)

name: Leafan
shortEffect: This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (2~6)% for each other Grass Pal in your party.

name: Leezpunk

shortEffect: When activated, Leezpunk Ignis and the player become invisible, making them undetectable to enemies for (10~20) seconds.

name: Loomen
shortEffect: While in party, the player's arrows explode on contact, dealing additional damage equal to (15~30)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

name: Loupmoon
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Jumping Claw. When this Pal uses Jumping Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Loupmoon Cryst
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Snow Claw. When this Pal uses Snow Claw, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon attack speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Lovander
shortEffect: While fighting together, grants the player and Lovander a life steal effect that restores (5~9)% of damage dealt as Health.

name: Lunaris
shortEffect: While in party, spheres home in on Pals, and carrying capacity increases by (300~600). (Does not stack)

shortEffect: When activated, the queen's soothing graces restore the Health of the player and Party Pals by (80~90)%.

name: Majex

shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases logging efficiency by (220~500)% and mining efficiency by (500~2000)%.

shortEffect: Sometimes digs up Gold Coin when assigned to Ranch.

shortEffect: Can be ridden as a mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Fire or Ground Pal in your party.

shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

name: Ophydia
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Soak (2~6). (Does not stack)

name: Orserk
shortEffect: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (1~5)% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)

name: Paladius
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can triple jump while mounted. Activate Spear Thrust to have Necromus stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.

name: Palumba
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (155~240)% while mounted on grass.

name: Panthalus
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Only 1 can be summoned to a base. While at a base, it constantly patrols the skies and bombards intruders from high above.

name: Pengullet
shortEffect: When activated, the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition. Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

name: Pengullet Lux
shortEffect: When activated, the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition. Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

name: Penking
shortEffect: While in party, Fire Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

name: Penking Lux
shortEffect: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Water damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

name: Petallia
shortEffect: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (75~85)%. While at a base, increases the Planting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Petallia Ignis
shortEffect: When activated, soothing blossoms restore the player's Health by (80~90)%. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Grass damage, and are immune to Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

name: Pierdon
shortEffect: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Muddy by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

name: Pierdon Cryst
shortEffect: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Dragon damage. (Does not stack)

name: Polapup
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes.

name: Polapup Terra
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (80~160)% while mounted on snow. Can also slide quickly down slopes. While it starts out slow, the top speed it can hit while sliding is no joke.

name: Prixter
shortEffect: While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Poison by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

name: Prixter Lux
shortEffect: When activated, Prixter Lux changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

name: Prunelia
shortEffect: While at a base, Prunelia's prayers bless the crops, increasing their harvest by (18~35)%.

name: Puffolt
shortEffect: While at a base, increases the Generating Electricity Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Pupperai
shortEffect: While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

name: Purple Slime
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

name: Pyrin
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Pyrin Noct
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Quivern
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases Attack of Dragon Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Quivern Botan
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Grass and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Ragnahawk
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Rainbow Slime
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

name: Rayhound
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Electric Pal in your party. (Excluding Rayhound )

name: Rayhound Cryst
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While in party, increases Defense of Ice Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Red Slime
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

name: Reindrix
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Heat Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

name: Relaxaurus
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

name: Relaxaurus Lux
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

name: Renjishi
shortEffect: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Burn (2~6). (Does not stack)

name: Reptyro
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by (30~60)%. (Does not stack)

name: Reptyro Cryst
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by (35~65)%. (Does not stack)

name: Ribbuny
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) While at a base, increases the Handiwork Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Ribbuny Botan
shortEffect: While in party, improves player's and Pals' Grass damage to enemy weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack) Increases efficiency by (200~400)% when working at a Weapon Workbench, Weapon Assembly Line, or other related facilities.

name: Robinquill
shortEffect: While in party, increases the player's bow damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

name: Robinquill Terra
shortEffect: While in party, increases the player's bow charge speed by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Rooby
shortEffect: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Roujay
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases player's and Pals' damage to enemies afflicted with Blind by (50~65)%. (Does not stack)

name: Rushoar
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, increases efficiency of destroying Stone by (500~2000)%.

name: Sekhmet
shortEffect: While at base, boosts Anubis's work speed by (20~40)%. Increases efficiency by (30~60)% if Sekhmet is also working at a Workbench, Workshop, or other related facilities. (Does not stack)

name: Selyne
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, enhances Neutral and Dark attacks by (15~30)%.

name: Shadowbeak
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. Enhances Dark attacks by (15~30)% while mounted.

name: Shaolong
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack increases by (4~8)% for each other Dragon Pal in your party.

name: Shroomer
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Sometimes drops Mushroom or Cavern Mushroom when assigned to Ranch.

name: Shroomer Noct
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While at a base, its mysterious spores slow the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases by (10~15)%.

name: Sibelyx
shortEffect: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Blizzard Spike. When this Pal uses Blizzard Spike, it has a x(1.1~2.5) damage multiplier. Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

name: Sibelyx Primo
shortEffect: While in party, increases Defense of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

name: Silvance
shortEffect: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

name: Silvegis
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces shield regeneration delay by (30~60)% and reduces damage taken by your shield by (65~80)%. (Does not stack)

name: Skutlass
shortEffect: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2600~3900) ). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

name: Skutlass Ignis
shortEffect: When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2900~4200) ). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass Ignis will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

name: Slowatt
shortEffect: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Electrify, the enemy discharges electricity, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

name: Smokie
shortEffect: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, Chromite acquisition increases by +(100~200)%.

name: Smokie Cryst
shortEffect: While at a base, increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Snock
shortEffect: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify (2~6). (Does not stack)

name: Snock Lux
shortEffect: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Water damage, and are immune to Soak. (Does not stack)

name: Snugloo
shortEffect: While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack)

name: Solenne
shortEffect: While in party, increases the player's Attack by (30~80)% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

name: Solmora
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

name: Solmora Lux
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

name: Sootseer
shortEffect: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Neutral damage. (Does not stack) Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

name: Souffline
shortEffect: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

name: Sparkit
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack of Electric Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Electric Organ when assigned to Ranch.

name: Splatterina
shortEffect: While in party, the amount of items obtained from using the Meat Cleaver increases by (100~200)%. (Does not stack)

name: Starryon
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Boosts jumping ability while mounted. This Pal's movement speed increases by +(50~100)% at night.

name: Starryon Primo
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo )

name: Surfent
shortEffect: Can be ridden to travel on water. Sometimes drops Leather when assigned to Ranch.

name: Surfent Terra
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Muddy (2~6). (Does not stack)

name: Suzaku
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku )

name: Suzaku Aqua
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku Aqua )

name: Swee
shortEffect: While in party, increases Attack and Defense of Sweepa.

name: Sweepa
shortEffect: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (12~24)% for each Swee in party.

name: Tanzee
shortEffect: When activated, Tanzee will mercilessly fire an assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

name: Tanzee Ignis
shortEffect: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

name: Tarantriss
shortEffect: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. Additionally, can shoot spider web to grapple and move at high speed.

name: Teafant
shortEffect: While in party, restores (20~40)% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack) (120-second cooldown after activation)

name: Tetroise
shortEffect: Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Tetroise Primo
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

name: Tocotoco
shortEffect: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into an egg launcher.

name: Tombat
shortEffect: When activated, uses ultrasonic waves to detect nearby dungeons, treasure chests, and scrap.

name: Tropicaw
shortEffect: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Turtacle
shortEffect: While in party, reduces Ore weight by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

name: Turtacle Terra
shortEffect: While in party, reduces weight of Sulfur and Coal by (80~100)%. Also improves player's and Pals' Ground damage to enemy weak points by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

name: Univolt
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Electric damage to weak points by (25~40)%. (Does not stack)

name: Univolt Cryst
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

name: Vaelet
shortEffect: While in party, Ground Pals drop (40~80)% more items when defeated. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops various seeds when assigned to Ranch.

name: Valentail
shortEffect: While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)

name: Vanwyrm
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by (20~40)%. (Does not stack)

name: Vanwyrm Cryst
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, increases damage player deals to enemy weak points by (30~50)%. (Does not stack)

name: Venusa
shortEffect: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind (2~6). (Does not stack)

name: Verdash
shortEffect: While in party, grants 1 additional jump and 1 additional mid-air dash. (Does not stack)

name: Vixy
shortEffect: Sometimes digs up items from the ground when assigned to Ranch.

name: Warsect
shortEffect: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within (5~9) seconds. (Does not stack)

name: Warsect Terra
shortEffect: While in your party, generates a barrier around the player after 5 melee hits are landed within (5~9) seconds. (Does not stack)

name: Whalaska
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigames start with the capture gauge increased by (5~14)%. Additionally, while the bars overlap, capture progress increases by (5~14)%. (Does not stack)

name: Whalaska Ignis
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, fishing minigame begins with the capture gauge (7~17)% higher than usual, and capture progress increases by (7~17)% while the bars overlap. (Does not stack)

name: Wispaw
shortEffect: While in party, increases the capture rate when awarded a back bonus. (Does not stack)

name: Wistella
shortEffect: While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

name: Wixen
shortEffect: When activated, Wixen changes the player's attack type to Fire and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

name: Wixen Noct
shortEffect: When activated, Wixen Noct changes the player's attack type to Dark and increases Attack by (30~50)%.

name: Woolipop
shortEffect: Sometimes drops Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-10~-20)%. (Does not stack)

name: Woolipop Terra
shortEffect: Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-15~-25)%. (Does not stack)

name: Wumpo
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While at a base, increases the Transporting Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

name: Wumpo Botan
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Ground damage and are immune to Muddy status. (Does not stack)

name: Xenogard
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the player's energy weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

name: Xenolord
shortEffect: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

name: Xenovader
shortEffect: While in party, increases the damage of the last bullet fired from a full-auto weapon by (100~160)%. (Does not stack)

name: Yakumo
shortEffect: Can be ridden. While fighting together, (15~30)% increased chance of encountering pals with the same Passive Skill as this Pal. (Excludes certain Passive Skills)
